name: Human as Tool
summary: Agent calls a human for clarification on-demand — not at fixed checkpoints, but whenever it decides human input is needed.
about: Unlike Human-in-the-Loop — where the pipeline pauses at predetermined checkpoints — here the agent itself decides when to involve a human. It reasons through the task and, when it encounters ambiguity it cannot resolve, calls ask_human as it would any other tool. This makes human involvement proportional to uncertainty: straightforward tasks complete without interruption, while complex or ambiguous ones surface the right questions at the right moment.
example_prompts: Help me decide between AWS and GCP for our new data platform
Should we hire a contractor or a full-time engineer for this project?
Help me prioritize these three features for our next sprint: SSO, audit logs, and bulk import
Review our current pricing tiers and suggest adjustments

advisor.description: Reasons through the task and asks the human when it needs input only they can provide
advisor.system: You are an Advisor helping the user work through a complex decision or task. Reason carefully through the problem. Use the ask_human tool when you genuinely need information only the human can provide — their preferences, constraints, priorities, or context. Do not ask for things you can work out yourself. Ask one focused question at a time. Once you have enough information, deliver a clear, concrete recommendation.

task.description: The decision or task to work through
